name: part_006
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_006.webm

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Hatsukoi Daisensou' (First Love Great War) by Choco, Noel, and Lamy.
MC segment discussing the new song, Valentine's theme, and upcoming release. Noel and Lamy depart.
Introduction of the next guest and performance of 'Otona na Furi shite'.

subtitles.original: 何度も試作した
subtitles.english: I made so many trial versions.

subtitles.original: 予行練習もした
subtitles.english: I even did a rehearsal.

subtitles.original: 弱気になどなるな
subtitles.english: Don't you get weak-hearted now.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫 自分史上 一番
subtitles.english: It's okay, I'm the cutest I've ever been...

subtitles.original: かわいい私なんだから
subtitles.english: ...in my entire history!

subtitles.original: 君は私と結ばれます
subtitles.english: You will be tied together with me.

subtitles.original: 結ばれる運命なのです
subtitles.english: It is our destiny to be together.

subtitles.original: 本命あげちゃう メルティ
subtitles.english: I'll give you my true love, melty.

subtitles.original: 誰にも渡さない大戦争
subtitles.english: A great war where I won't hand you to anyone.

subtitles.original: トキメイちゃいます メルシー
subtitles.english: My heart is fluttering, merci.

subtitles.original: それじゃ手とか繋いじゃう？
subtitles.english: Then shall we hold hands?

subtitles.original: 内緒デート
subtitles.english: A secret date.

subtitles.original: ズキズキ Kiss
subtitles.english: Throbbing Kiss.

subtitles.original: 甘くていいの
subtitles.english: It's okay to be sweet.

subtitles.original: ズキズキ Heart
subtitles.english: Throbbing Heart.

subtitles.original: こういうのがいいっしょ
subtitles.english: You like this kind of thing, right?

subtitles.original: 初恋なんだもん
subtitles.english: Because it's my first love.

subtitles.original: 絶対譲らない覚悟です
subtitles.english: I'm prepared to never give you up.

subtitles.original: 本気なのです
subtitles.english: I am serious about this.

subtitles.original: 目を見て言って
subtitles.english: Look me in the eyes and say...

subtitles.original: 君の気持ち
subtitles.english: ...how you feel.

subtitles.original: Pure love, Pure love...
subtitles.english: Pure love, Pure love...

subtitles.original: はい、ということで！チョコ達3人の新曲でした！
subtitles.english: Okay! So that was the new song from the three of us Chocos!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: いい新曲でしたー
subtitles.english: It was a good new song~

subtitles.original: 改めまして、ノエル様、ラミィ様と...
subtitles.english: Once again, together with Noel-sama and Lamy-sama...

subtitles.original: ...一緒にね、コラボ歌唱した
subtitles.english: ...we performed a collaboration song...

subtitles.original: 「初恋大戦争」という新曲なんですけど
subtitles.english: ...this new track called 'Hatsukoi Daisensou'.

subtitles.original: 今回、作詞作曲をMedansy様
subtitles.english: For this song, lyrics and composition were by Medansy-sama...

subtitles.original: そして、編曲をYousuke様にお願いいたしました！
subtitles.english: ...and we asked Yousuke-sama for the arrangement!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: いや、今回のテーマが、バレンタインの日に
subtitles.english: So, the theme this time is, on Valentine's Day...

subtitles.original: 3人の可愛い女の子達が
subtitles.english: ...three cute girls...

subtitles.original: 1人の男の子を手に入れるために
subtitles.english: ...in order to win over one boy...

subtitles.original: バチバチにね、出し抜こうとする、みたいな
subtitles.english: ...are aggressively trying to outwit each other.

subtitles.original: 激重なテーマ楽曲となっております
subtitles.english: It's become a song with quite a heavy theme.

subtitles.original: いやもう3人の声が合わさって、めちゃめちゃアイドルソングになっているので
subtitles.english: Our three voices combined to make a super idol-like song...

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆様、聴いてください！
subtitles.english: ...so everyone, please definitely listen to it!

subtitles.original: 聴いてねー
subtitles.english: Listen to it~

subtitles.original: 何回も聴きたいなー
subtitles.english: I want to listen to it over and over.

subtitles.original: いけるとこまでいこうかなー
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can go as far as I can.

subtitles.original: いや、こちらの楽曲は、この後24時から
subtitles.english: Well, this song will be available after this at 24:00...

subtitles.original: 2月の15日0時からね、各社音楽サイトにて
subtitles.english: ...from February 15th at 0:00 on various music sites...

subtitles.original: 配信されます！
subtitles.english: ...it will be distributed!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 聴けるー
subtitles.english: We can listen to it!

subtitles.original: そしてね、この配信後すぐに
subtitles.english: And, right after this broadcast...

subtitles.original: この楽曲のMVが
subtitles.english: ...the Music Video for this song...

subtitles.original: 公開されます！
subtitles.english: ...will be premiered!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: いやぜひぜひ皆様、いっぱい聴いて、MVの方にも
subtitles.english: Everyone, please listen a lot, and for the MV too...

subtitles.original: ちょっと感想とかね、コメントいただけたら嬉しいかなって思います
subtitles.english: ...I'd be happy if you could leave some thoughts or comments.

subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: じゃあね、二人とも、今日はありがとう！
subtitles.english: Alright then, thank you both for today!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: 引き続きね、頑張ってください
subtitles.english: Please continue to do your best!

subtitles.original: 頑張る！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: I will! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ほならば、おさらばじゃ！
subtitles.english: Well then, farewell!

subtitles.original: おさらば！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Farewell! Thank you!

subtitles.original: そして、ここからライブ後半となります！
subtitles.english: And now, the second half of the live begins!

subtitles.original: まだまだ、ゲストパートとか
subtitles.english: There are still more guest parts...

subtitles.original: なんと最後に、重大告知もあるので
subtitles.english: ...and believe it or not, a huge announcement at the end...

subtitles.original: 皆様、一緒に楽しんでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: ...so everyone, let's enjoy it together!

subtitles.original: それでは、次のゲストは...こちら！
subtitles.english: So then, the next guest is... this person!

subtitles.original: 急に会いたいって
subtitles.english: You said you wanted to see me suddenly.

subtitles.original: いつものように準備してる
subtitles.english: I'm getting ready just like always.

subtitles.original: 午前0時過ぎの終電で向かう
subtitles.english: Heading there on the last train past midnight.

subtitles.original: バカでした
subtitles.english: I was a fool.

subtitles.original: やめときなよって言われても
subtitles.english: Even though I was told to stop...

subtitles.original: また会いに行く
subtitles.english: ...I'm going to see you again.

subtitles.original: 会いたいから
subtitles.english: Because I want to see you.
